_description: Known/pre-existing issues for LTG_TOOL_ci_suite.py --known-issues flag. Add entries here to mark expected WARNs so regressions stand out in CI output.
_format: List of {check, file, code, reason, since_cycle} objects. 'file' is basename only. 'code' is the warning code (e.g. W004, G007). Use null for code to match any issue on that file in that check. 'since_cycle' is the cycle label when the entry was added (e.g. 'C39') — used by --warn-stale N to flag suppressions older than N cycles.

known_issues.reason: Pattern: img.paste(img_rgba.convert('RGB')) in composite helper — no draw calls follow, false positive. C39 baseline.
Pattern: Image.alpha_composite() lighting overlay passes — final composites, no draw calls follow. C39 baseline.
Pattern: img.paste(Image.alpha_composite(...)) — final overlay pass, no draw calls follow. C39 baseline.
Pattern: draw.rectangle(fill=..., outline=...) — PIL draws fill+outline in one call; not a real painter violation. C39 baseline.
Pattern: draw.rectangle(fill=..., outline=...) — PIL draws fill+outline in one call; not a real painter violation. C39 baseline.
Annotation/diagnostic overlay rectangles — draw.rectangle with outline only (no fill); not a real painter violation. C39 baseline.
Pattern: img.paste(base_rgba.convert('RGB')) — per-glyph composite in gradient loop, no draw calls follow paste. C39 baseline.
Annotation text draw in motion spec sheet panel header — text label, not actual head/face element. C39 baseline.
Library utility functions use img.paste() for compositing; callers rebuild draw object. No stale-draw risk in practice. C39 baseline.
Pattern: img.paste(Image.alpha_composite(base, glow).convert('RGB')) — glow pass, no draw calls follow. C39 baseline.
Pattern: img.paste(thumb, ...) — thumbnail composite, no draw calls follow. C39 baseline.
Pattern: img.paste(Image.alpha_composite(base, glow).convert('RGB')) — glow pass, no draw calls follow. C39 baseline.
Pattern: img.paste(Image.alpha_composite(base, glow).convert('RGB')) — glow pass, no draw calls follow. C39 baseline.
Pattern: img.paste(Image.alpha_composite(base, glow).convert('RGB')) — glow pass, no draw calls follow. C39 baseline.
Pattern: img.paste(Image.alpha_composite(base, glow).convert('RGB')) — glow pass, no draw calls follow. C39 baseline.
Pattern: img.paste(Image.alpha_composite(base, glow).convert('RGB')) — glow pass, no draw calls follow. C39 baseline.
Pattern: img.paste(Image.alpha_composite(base, glow).convert('RGB')) — glow pass, no draw calls follow. C39 baseline.
Pattern: img.paste(Image.alpha_composite(base, glow).convert('RGB')) — glow pass, no draw calls follow. C39 baseline.
Pattern: img.paste(Image.alpha_composite(base, glow).convert('RGB')) — glow pass, no draw calls follow. C39 baseline.
Pattern: img.paste(Image.alpha_composite(base, glow).convert('RGB')) — glow pass, no draw calls follow. C39 baseline.
Pattern: img.paste(Image.alpha_composite(base, glow).convert('RGB')) — glow pass, no draw calls follow. C39 baseline.
Pattern: img.paste(Image.alpha_composite(base, glow).convert('RGB')) — glow pass, no draw calls follow. C39 baseline.
Pattern: img.paste(Image.alpha_composite(base, glow).convert('RGB')) — glow pass, no draw calls follow. C39 baseline.
Pattern: img.paste(Image.alpha_composite(base, glow).convert('RGB')) — glow pass, no draw calls follow. C39 baseline.
Pattern: img.paste() on split-composite — ghost overlay and side composites, no draw calls follow. C39 baseline.
Byte motion sheet is not a Glitch expression sheet — multi-expression check does not apply. C39 baseline FP.
Byte motion sheet has no Glitch body polygon — UV_PURPLE shadow check does not apply. C39 baseline FP.
Byte motion sheet has no Glitch body polygon — VOID_BLACK outline check does not apply. C39 baseline FP.
Background-only ENV generator; contains CORRUPT_AMBER storm confetti color but no Glitch character body polygon. C39 baseline FP.
Background-only ENV generator; contains CORRUPT_AMBER storm confetti color but no Glitch character body polygon. C39 baseline FP.
Background-only ENV generator; contains GL color constants but no Glitch character body polygon. C39 baseline FP.

Byte motion sheet; no Glitch body polygon. C39 baseline FP.
Byte motion sheet; no Glitch body polygon. C39 baseline FP.

Face-lighting test utility; skin tone color tuples in test fixture trigger organic-fill check. C39 baseline FP.
Face-lighting test utility; no Glitch body polygon. C39 baseline FP.
Color verification utility; contains palette color tuples that trigger G005 numeric match. C39 baseline FP.
Color verification utility; contains VOID_BLACK constant but no draw.polygon call. C39 baseline FP.
Fidelity check utility; palette color tuples trigger G005. C39 baseline FP.
Fidelity check utility; VOID_BLACK constant but no draw.polygon. C39 baseline FP.
Color model swatch sheet; SOFT_GOLD swatch (200,160,80) triggers organic-fill check but is an intentional swatch label. C39 baseline FP.
Turnaround uses draw.polygon with outline color variable (not literal VOID_BLACK constant) — linter misses this pattern. C39 baseline FP.
SF02 uses Glitch body polygon via procedural_draw lib — direct draw.polygon call absent, linter does not detect library delegation. C39 baseline FP.
SF03 uses Glitch body polygon via procedural_draw lib — direct draw.polygon call absent, linter does not detect library delegation. C39 baseline FP.
